identity.archetype: The Performance Pro (Trust) x Vibrant Play (Approachability)

typography.rules: Use Outfit for all Headings (h1-h6). Use Plus Jakarta Sans for all body text, buttons, and inputs.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF7A00] to-[#FF9E2C] text-white shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 hover:shadow-orange-500/40 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full font-medium px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all duration-200 rounded-full font-medium px-8 py-3
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: group cursor-pointer bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.06)] hover:border-orange-100 transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: h-12 bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-100 focus:border-orange-500 transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-100 z-50 hidden md:block
navigation.navbar: sticky top-0 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-100 z-40
navigation.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-slate-100 z-50 md:hidden pb-safe

hero.alt: Modern bright living room interior representing a clean home
hero.usage: Landing page hero background or main visual

family.alt: Happy Indonesian family enjoying time at home

visual_enhancers.noise: bg-noise opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-500 is not used on grey backgrounds. Use text-slate-600 minimum.
accessibility.labels: All icon-only buttons MUST have aria-label

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' font for headings and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body. Import them from Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement the 'Orange Gradient' (#FF7A00 -> #FF9E2C) as the primary brand element.
Use the provided image URLs for the landing page and service cards. DO NOT leave placeholders.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar (Mitra/Admin) vs Navbar (User) logic based on role.
Ensure the 'Mitra' dashboard is high-density (Bento Grid Mode B) for data, while 'User' dashboard is softer and more spacious.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Do not use TypeScript (.ts/.tsx). Use JavaScript (.js/.jsx).
Background color of the app should be #F5F6FA (soft grey), with white cards.
For the 'Book' flow, use a multi-step form wizard with clear progress indicators.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
